canonical_explanation.text: Inverse trigonometric functions are the inverse of trigonometric functions defined on restricted domains. The principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№ has domain [-1,1] and range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], cosвҒ»В№ has domain [-1,1] and range [0,ПҖ], and tanвҒ»В№ has domain в„қ and range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). Key identities include sinвҒ»В№(x)+cosвҒ»В№(x)=ПҖ/2, tanвҒ»В№(x)+cotвҒ»В№(x)=ПҖ/2, and the addition formula tanвҒ»В№x+tanвҒ»В№y=tanвҒ»В№((x+y)/(1-xy)) when xy<1.
rules: sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 for all x вҲҲ [-1, 1]
tanвҒ»В№(x) + cotвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 for all x вҲҲ в„қ

questions.question_text: The principal value of sinвҒ»В№(1/2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sin(ПҖ/6) = 1/2 and ПҖ/6 вҲҲ [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], so sinвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ/6.
questions.explanation_incorrect: The principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№ has range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2]. Since sin(ПҖ/6) = 1/2, the answer is ПҖ/6.

questions.question_text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(1/2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cos(ПҖ/3) = 1/2 and ПҖ/3 вҲҲ [0, ПҖ], so cosвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ/3.
questions.explanation_incorrect: The principal value branch of cosвҒ»В№ has range [0, ПҖ]. Since cos(ПҖ/3) = 1/2, the answer is ПҖ/3, not ПҖ/6.

questions.question_text: The principal value of tanвҒ»В№(1) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tan(ПҖ/4) = 1 and ПҖ/4 вҲҲ (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), so tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4.
questions.explanation_incorrect: The principal value branch of tanвҒ»В№ has range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). Since tan(ПҖ/4) = 1, the answer is ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: The domain of the function sinвҒ»В№(x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sinвҒ»В№(x) is defined only when -1 вүӨ x вүӨ 1, so the domain is [-1, 1].
questions.explanation_incorrect: The inverse sine function is defined only for inputs in [-1, 1] since sine outputs values only in this range. [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2] is the range, not the domain.

questions.question_text: The range (principal value branch) of cosвҒ»В№(x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: The principal value branch of cosвҒ»В№ is defined with range [0, ПҖ].
questions.explanation_incorrect: cosвҒ»В№(x) returns values in [0, ПҖ]. The range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2] belongs to sinвҒ»В№(x).

questions.question_text: The range (principal value branch) of tanвҒ»В№(x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: The principal value branch of tanвҒ»В№ has range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). The endpoints are excluded because tan is undefined at ВұПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: tanвҒ»В№(x) returns values in the open interval (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). Note this is an open interval, not closed.

questions.question_text: The principal value of sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sin(ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3/2 and ПҖ/3 вҲҲ [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], so sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ/3.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since sin(ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3/2 and ПҖ/3 lies in the principal range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], the answer is ПҖ/3.

questions.question_text: The domain of secвҒ»В№(x) is (-вҲһ, -1] вҲӘ [1, вҲһ).
questions.explanation_correct: secвҒ»В№(x) is defined when |x| вүҘ 1, i.e., x вҲҲ (-вҲһ, -1] вҲӘ [1, вҲһ), since sec takes values outside (-1, 1).
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since sec A = 1/cos A can only take values with |sec A| вүҘ 1, the domain of secвҒ»В№ is indeed (-вҲһ, -1] вҲӘ [1, вҲһ).

questions.question_text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(0) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cos(ПҖ/2) = 0 and ПҖ/2 вҲҲ [0, ПҖ], so cosвҒ»В№(0) = ПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: The principal value branch of cosвҒ»В№ has range [0, ПҖ]. Since cos(ПҖ/2) = 0, cosвҒ»В№(0) = ПҖ/2.

questions.question_text: The principal value of tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tan(ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3 and ПҖ/3 вҲҲ (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), so tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) = ПҖ/3.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since tan(ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3 and ПҖ/3 lies in the principal range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), the answer is ПҖ/3.

questions.question_text: The domain of cotвҒ»В№(x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cotвҒ»В№(x) is defined for all real numbers, so its domain is (-вҲһ, вҲһ) = в„қ.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since cot can take any real value, cotвҒ»В№ is defined for all x вҲҲ в„қ. The range (0, ПҖ) is the range, not the domain.

questions.question_text: The principal value of sinвҒ»В№(1) is ___.
questions.explanation_correct: sin(ПҖ/2) = 1 and ПҖ/2 вҲҲ [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], so sinвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since sin(ПҖ/2) = 1, and ПҖ/2 is the upper boundary of the principal range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], sinвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/2.

questions.question_text: The range of cosecвҒ»В№(x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: The principal value branch of cosecвҒ»В№ has range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2] - {0}, since cosec is undefined at 0.
questions.explanation_incorrect: cosecвҒ»В№(x) takes values in [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2] excluding 0, because cosec(0) is undefined.

questions.question_text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(-1) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cos(ПҖ) = -1 and ПҖ вҲҲ [0, ПҖ], so cosвҒ»В№(-1) = ПҖ.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since cos(ПҖ) = -1 and ПҖ lies in the principal range [0, ПҖ], cosвҒ»В№(-1) = ПҖ.

questions.question_text: The principal value of tanвҒ»В№(0) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tan(0) = 0 and 0 вҲҲ (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), so tanвҒ»В№(0) = 0.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since tan(0) = 0 and 0 lies in the principal range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), tanвҒ»В№(0) = 0.

questions.question_text: The range of the principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№(x) is [0, ПҖ].
questions.explanation_correct: The range of the principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№(x) is [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], not [0, ПҖ]. The range [0, ПҖ] belongs to cosвҒ»В№(x).
questions.explanation_incorrect: The range [0, ПҖ] is for cosвҒ»В№(x). The principal value branch of sinвҒ»В№(x) has range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2].

questions.question_text: sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) equals:
questions.explanation_correct: For all x вҲҲ [-1, 1], sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2. This is a fundamental property of inverse trigonometric functions.
questions.explanation_incorrect: This is a standard identity: sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 for every x in [-1, 1].

questions.question_text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(-x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sinвҒ»В№(-x) = -sinвҒ»В№(x) for all x вҲҲ [-1, 1]. This is because sinвҒ»В№ is an odd function.
questions.explanation_incorrect: sinвҒ»В№ is an odd function, so sinвҒ»В№(-x) = -sinвҒ»В№(x). This follows from the fact that sin is an odd function on the principal domain.

questions.question_text: The value of cosвҒ»В№(-x) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cosвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(x) for all x вҲҲ [-1, 1]. Unlike sinвҒ»В№, cosвҒ»В№ is not an odd function.
questions.explanation_incorrect: This is because if cosвҒ»В№(x) = Оё, then cosвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - Оё, since cos(ПҖ - Оё) = -cos(Оё).

questions.question_text: tanвҒ»В№(x) + cotвҒ»В№(x) equals:
questions.explanation_correct: For all x вҲҲ в„қ, tanвҒ»В№(x) + cotвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: This is a standard identity analogous to sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2.

questions.question_text: sinвҒ»В№(1/x) is equal to:
questions.explanation_correct: If sinвҒ»В№(1/x) = Оё, then sinОё = 1/x, so cosecОё = x, meaning Оё = cosecвҒ»В№(x). Hence sinвҒ»В№(1/x) = cosecвҒ»В№(x).
questions.explanation_incorrect: sinвҒ»В№(1/x) = cosecвҒ»В№(x) because if sinОё = 1/x then cosecОё = x.

questions.question_text: tanвҒ»В№(-x) = -tanвҒ»В№(x) for all x вҲҲ в„қ.
questions.explanation_correct: tanвҒ»В№ is an odd function, so tanвҒ»В№(-x) = -tanвҒ»В№(x) for all real x. This follows from the fact that tan is an odd function on its principal domain.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since tan is odd on (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), its inverse tanвҒ»В№ is also odd: tanвҒ»В№(-x) = -tanвҒ»В№(x).

questions.question_text: The principal value of sinвҒ»В№(-1/вҲҡ2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sinвҒ»В№(-1/вҲҡ2) = -sinвҒ»В№(1/вҲҡ2) = -ПҖ/4. This uses the property sinвҒ»В№(-x) = -sinвҒ»В№(x) and sin(ПҖ/4) = 1/вҲҡ2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using sinвҒ»В№(-x) = -sinвҒ»В№(x): sinвҒ»В№(-1/вҲҡ2) = -sinвҒ»В№(1/вҲҡ2) = -ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: The principal value of cosвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cosвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ - ПҖ/6 = 5ПҖ/6. This uses cosвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(x).
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using cosвҒ»В№(-x) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(x): cosвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ - ПҖ/6 = 5ПҖ/6.

questions.question_text: The principal value of tanвҒ»В№(-1) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tanвҒ»В№(-1) = -tanвҒ»В№(1) = -ПҖ/4. This uses tanвҒ»В№(-x) = -tanвҒ»В№(x).
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since tanвҒ»В№ is an odd function, tanвҒ»В№(-1) = -tanвҒ»В№(1) = -ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: If sinвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/5, then cosвҒ»В№(x) equals:
questions.explanation_correct: Using sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2: cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 - ПҖ/5 = (5ПҖ - 2ПҖ)/10 = 3ПҖ/10.
questions.explanation_incorrect: From the identity sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2, we get cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 - ПҖ/5 = 3ПҖ/10.

questions.question_text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(1) + tanвҒ»В№(2) + tanвҒ»В№(3) is:
questions.explanation_correct: First, tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4. For tanвҒ»В№(2) + tanвҒ»В№(3): since 2Г—3 = 6 > 1, tanвҒ»В№(2) + tanвҒ»В№(3) = ПҖ + tanвҒ»В№((2+3)/(1-6)) = ПҖ + tanвҒ»В№(-1) = ПҖ - ПҖ/4 = 3ПҖ/4. So the total = ПҖ/4 + 3ПҖ/4 = ПҖ.
questions.explanation_incorrect: tanвҒ»В№(2) + tanвҒ»В№(3) = ПҖ + tanвҒ»В№((2+3)/(1-2Г—3)) = ПҖ + tanвҒ»В№(-1) = 3ПҖ/4. Adding tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4 gives ПҖ.

questions.question_text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(1/2) + tanвҒ»В№(1/3) is:
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using the addition formula with xy = 1/6 < 1: tanвҒ»В№((1/2 + 1/3)/(1 - 1/6)) = tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: The value of sin(sinвҒ»В№(1/2) + cosвҒ»В№(1/2)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sinвҒ»В№(1/2) + cosвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ/2 (by the identity). So sin(ПҖ/2) = 1.
questions.explanation_incorrect: By the identity sinвҒ»В№(x) + cosвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2, the argument is ПҖ/2, and sin(ПҖ/2) = 1.

questions.question_text: The value of tan(cosвҒ»В№(4/5)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оё = cosвҒ»В№(4/5). Then cosОё = 4/5, so sinОё = 3/5 (since Оё вҲҲ [0, ПҖ], sinОё вүҘ 0). Therefore tanОё = sinОё/cosОё = (3/5)/(4/5) = 3/4.
questions.explanation_incorrect: If cosОё = 4/5, then opposite = вҲҡ(25-16) = 3 and tanОё = 3/4.

questions.question_text: The value of cos(tanвҒ»В№(3/4)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оё = tanвҒ»В№(3/4). Then tanОё = 3/4, so the sides are 3, 4, hypotenuse = 5. Therefore cosОё = 4/5.
questions.explanation_incorrect: If tanОё = 3/4, construct a right triangle with opposite = 3, adjacent = 4, hypotenuse = 5. cosОё = adjacent/hypotenuse = 4/5.

questions.question_text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(sin(2ПҖ/3)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: sin(2ПҖ/3) = sin(ПҖ - ПҖ/3) = sin(ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3/2. Since sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ/3 and ПҖ/3 вҲҲ [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2], the answer is ПҖ/3. Note: sinвҒ»В№(sin(x)) вү  x when x is outside [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2].
questions.explanation_incorrect: 2ПҖ/3 is outside the principal range [-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2]. sin(2ПҖ/3) = вҲҡ3/2, and sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ/3.

questions.question_text: The value of cosвҒ»В№(cos(7ПҖ/6)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: cos(7ПҖ/6) = cos(ПҖ + ПҖ/6) = -cos(ПҖ/6) = -вҲҡ3/2. Now cosвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3/2) = ПҖ - ПҖ/6 = 5ПҖ/6.
questions.explanation_incorrect: 7ПҖ/6 is outside [0, ПҖ]. cos(7ПҖ/6) = -вҲҡ3/2, and cosвҒ»В№(-вҲҡ3/2) = 5ПҖ/6.

questions.question_text: The value of secвҒ»В№(2) + cosecвҒ»В№(2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: secвҒ»В№(2) = cosвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ/3. cosecвҒ»В№(2) = sinвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ/6. Sum = ПҖ/3 + ПҖ/6 = ПҖ/2. This also follows from secвҒ»В№(x) + cosecвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/2 for x вүҘ 1.
questions.explanation_incorrect: secвҒ»В№(2) = ПҖ/3 and cosecвҒ»В№(2) = ПҖ/6. Their sum is ПҖ/3 + ПҖ/6 = ПҖ/2.

questions.question_text: If tanвҒ»В№(x) = ПҖ/4 - tanвҒ»В№(1/3), then x = ___.
questions.explanation_correct: tanвҒ»В№(x) = tanвҒ»В№(1) - tanвҒ»В№(1/3). Using the subtraction formula: x = (1 - 1/3)/(1 + 1 Г— 1/3) = (2/3)/(4/3) = 1/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Since ПҖ/4 = tanвҒ»В№(1), we have tanвҒ»В№(x) = tanвҒ»В№(1) - tanвҒ»В№(1/3) = tanвҒ»В№((1 - 1/3)/(1 + 1/3)) = tanвҒ»В№(1/2).

questions.question_text: cosвҒ»В№(1/x) for |x| вүҘ 1 is equal to:
questions.explanation_correct: If cosвҒ»В№(1/x) = Оё, then cosОё = 1/x, so secОё = x, meaning Оё = secвҒ»В№(x). Hence cosвҒ»В№(1/x) = secвҒ»В№(x).
questions.explanation_incorrect: cosвҒ»В№(1/x) = secвҒ»В№(x) because sec = 1/cos.

questions.question_text: The value of 2tanвҒ»В№(1/3) is equal to:
The value of sinвҒ»В№(3/5) + sinвҒ»В№(4/5) is:
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оұ = sinвҒ»В№(3/5) and ОІ = sinвҒ»В№(4/5). Then cosОұ = 4/5 and cosОІ = 3/5. So sinОұ = cosОІ, which means sinОұ = sin(ПҖ/2 - ОІ), giving Оұ = ПҖ/2 - ОІ, i.e., Оұ + ОІ = ПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: sinвҒ»В№(3/5) = cosвҒ»В№(4/5). So sinвҒ»В№(3/5) + sinвҒ»В№(4/5) = cosвҒ»В№(4/5) + sinвҒ»В№(4/5) = ПҖ/2.

questions.question_text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(1/2) + tanвҒ»В№(1/5) + tanвҒ»В№(1/8) is:
questions.explanation_incorrect: Combining step by step: tanвҒ»В№(1/2) + tanвҒ»В№(1/5) = tanвҒ»В№(7/9). Then tanвҒ»В№(7/9) + tanвҒ»В№(1/8) = tanвҒ»В№((56+9)/(72-7)) = tanвҒ»В№(65/65) = ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: If tanвҒ»В№(x) + tanвҒ»В№(y) + tanвҒ»В№(z) = ПҖ, then x + y + z equals:
questions.explanation_correct: If tanвҒ»В№(x) + tanвҒ»В№(y) + tanвҒ»В№(z) = ПҖ, then using the identity for sum of three inverse tangents, we get x + y + z = xyz.
questions.explanation_incorrect: This is a standard result. If Оұ + ОІ + Оі = ПҖ, then tanОұ + tanОІ + tanОі = tanОұ В· tanОІ В· tanОі, which gives x + y + z = xyz.

questions.question_text: The value of 2tanвҒ»В№(1/3) + tanвҒ»В№(1/7) is:
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using the double angle formula first: 2tanвҒ»В№(1/3) = tanвҒ»В№(3/4). Then applying the addition formula: tanвҒ»В№(3/4) + tanвҒ»В№(1/7) = tanвҒ»В№((21+4)/(28-3)) = tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: The value of sin(2sinвҒ»В№(3/5)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оё = sinвҒ»В№(3/5). Then sinОё = 3/5, cosОё = 4/5. sin(2Оё) = 2sinОёcosОё = 2(3/5)(4/5) = 24/25.
questions.explanation_incorrect: With Оё = sinвҒ»В№(3/5): sinОё = 3/5, cosОё = 4/5. sin(2Оё) = 2 Г— 3/5 Г— 4/5 = 24/25.

questions.question_text: The value of cos(2cosвҒ»В№(3/5)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оё = cosвҒ»В№(3/5). Then cosОё = 3/5. cos(2Оё) = 2cosВІОё - 1 = 2(9/25) - 1 = 18/25 - 1 = -7/25.
questions.explanation_incorrect: With Оё = cosвҒ»В№(3/5): cos(2Оё) = 2cosВІОё - 1 = 2(9/25) - 1 = -7/25.

questions.question_text: The simplified value of tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) - secвҒ»В№(-2) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) = ПҖ/3. secвҒ»В№(-2) = cosвҒ»В№(-1/2) = ПҖ - cosвҒ»В№(1/2) = ПҖ - ПҖ/3 = 2ПҖ/3. So ПҖ/3 - 2ПҖ/3 = -ПҖ/3.
questions.explanation_incorrect: tanвҒ»В№(вҲҡ3) = ПҖ/3 and secвҒ»В№(-2) = cosвҒ»В№(-1/2) = 2ПҖ/3. The difference is ПҖ/3 - 2ПҖ/3 = -ПҖ/3.

questions.question_text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(tan(3ПҖ/4)) is:
questions.explanation_correct: tan(3ПҖ/4) = tan(ПҖ - ПҖ/4) = -tan(ПҖ/4) = -1. So tanвҒ»В№(-1) = -ПҖ/4. Note that 3ПҖ/4 is outside (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2), so tanвҒ»В№(tan(3ПҖ/4)) вү  3ПҖ/4.
questions.explanation_incorrect: 3ПҖ/4 is outside the principal range (-ПҖ/2, ПҖ/2). tan(3ПҖ/4) = -1, and tanвҒ»В№(-1) = -ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: The value of tan(2tanвҒ»В№(1/5)) is ___.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using tan(2Оё) = 2tanОё/(1-tanВІОё) with tanОё = 1/5: (2/5)/(24/25) = 5/12.

questions.question_text: The value of sinвҒ»В№(2 Г— (1/4) Г— вҲҡ(1 - 1/16)) is equal to:
questions.explanation_correct: We know 2sinвҒ»В№(x) = sinвҒ»В№(2xвҲҡ(1-xВІ)) for |x| вүӨ 1/вҲҡ2. Here x = 1/4, so 2xвҲҡ(1-xВІ) = 2(1/4)вҲҡ(15/16) = (1/2)(вҲҡ15/4) = вҲҡ15/8. The given expression equals sinвҒ»В№(вҲҡ15/8) = 2sinвҒ»В№(1/4).
questions.explanation_incorrect: This uses the identity 2sinвҒ»В№(x) = sinвҒ»В№(2xвҲҡ(1-xВІ)). With x = 1/4, the expression simplifies to 2sinвҒ»В№(1/4).

questions.question_text: The value of tanвҒ»В№(1/3) + tanвҒ»В№(1/5) + tanвҒ»В№(1/7) + tanвҒ»В№(1/8) is:
questions.explanation_incorrect: Grouping into pairs and applying the addition formula twice, the sum reduces to tanвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/4.

questions.question_text: 2tanвҒ»В№(1) = sinвҒ»В№(1).
questions.explanation_correct: 2tanвҒ»В№(1) = 2 Г— ПҖ/4 = ПҖ/2. sinвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/2. They are equal. Alternatively, using 2tanвҒ»В№(x) = sinвҒ»В№(2x/(1+xВІ)) with x = 1: sinвҒ»В№(2/2) = sinвҒ»В№(1) = ПҖ/2.
questions.explanation_incorrect: 2tanвҒ»В№(1) = 2(ПҖ/4) = ПҖ/2 = sinвҒ»В№(1). So the statement is true.

questions.question_text: The value of cos(sinвҒ»В№(3/5) + cosвҒ»В№(12/13)) is ___.
questions.explanation_correct: Let Оұ = sinвҒ»В№(3/5): sinОұ = 3/5, cosОұ = 4/5. Let ОІ = cosвҒ»В№(12/13): cosОІ = 12/13, sinОІ = 5/13. cos(Оұ+ОІ) = cosОұcosОІ - sinОұsinОІ = (4/5)(12/13) - (3/5)(5/13) = 48/65 - 15/65 = 33/65.
questions.explanation_incorrect: Using cos(Оұ+ОІ) = cosОұcosОІ - sinОұsinОІ with the appropriate triangle values gives 33/65.
